matches.x: IT is necessary to call your attention to an idea expressed by Jonathan, the son of Uzziel. When he saw that the prophet says in reference to the Ofannim, “It was cried unto them in my hearing, O gilgal” (“sphere”) (x. 13), he assumed that by Ofannim the heavens are meant, and rendered Ofan by gilgal, “sphere,” and Ofannim by gilgelaya, “spheres.” I have no doubt that he found a confirmation of…
The ears: May the anointing of holiness be for thee unto hearing of the divine commandments.
